changes.description: Restructure BiomarkerDetailZones into three-layer model: Layer 1 (what this result means now — already in card body), Layer 2 (why this marker matters — educationalExplainer), Layer 3 (how it connects — contributionContext + patternRelevanceLine)
changes.root_cause: BiomarkerDetailZones at BiomarkerDials.tsx:197-240 currently renders educationalExplainer, contributionContext, and relatedSystemGroupNames as flat unlabelled sections. The sprint requires a named, layered structure matching the three-layer model. Layer 1 (value, reference range, status, interpretation) is already in the card body at BiomarkerDials.tsx:302-348 and must remain there as the minimum layer — it must NOT be duplicated inside the expansion zone. Layer 2 must display educationalExplainer.body (confirmed at BiomarkerDials.tsx:209-213, authority: analysis.ts:52-58 BiomarkerEducationalExplainerV1.body). Layer 3 must display contributionContext.factual_statement (confirmed at BiomarkerDials.tsx:216-221, authority: analysis.ts:68-73 ContributionContextV1.factual_statement) plus patternRelevanceLine (new prop — see Change B). relatedSystemGroupNames badges (BiomarkerDials.tsx:224-237) are eligible to be retained as Layer 3 supporting detail but must not substitute for patternRelevanceLine. If Layer 2 content is absent, omit Layer 2 entirely — do not render an empty shell. If Layer 3 content is absent (no contributionContext and no patternRelevanceLine), omit Layer 3 entirely.
changes.scope_constraint: Layer 1 must not be duplicated inside the expansion zone — it lives in the card body only. If both Layer 2 and Layer 3 are absent, the expansion zone must render nothing (or the expand button must be suppressed). Do not fabricate label text or educational prose where the real field is absent.

changes.description: Add patternRelevanceLine?: string | null to BiomarkerDialEntry; compute per-marker in results/page.tsx inside the biomarkers.forEach loop using primaryDriver, contribution_context, and clinicianReport primary_concern; pass through biomarkerDialData to BiomarkerDials
changes.root_cause: BiomarkerDialEntry interface confirmed at BiomarkerDials.tsx:10-26. The interface currently lacks a patternRelevanceLine field. Adding it as optional (?: string | null) is an internal component prop change only — NOT a DTO change (BiomarkerDialEntry is defined in BiomarkerDials.tsx, not in analysis.ts). The results/page.tsx biomarkers.forEach loop at lines 382-407 already maps all BiomarkerDialEntry fields from the DTO. The derivation logic must be added inside this loop. Derivation inputs available in results/page.tsx: primaryDriver (line 147, type { id: string; name: string; biomarkers: string[] } | null, computed from clusters[]), clinicianReport?.sections?.page1?.primary_concern (line 138 clinicianReport, type ClinicianReportV1 | null | undefined — primary_concern confirmed at analysis.ts:183 as string). Derivation rule: if (contributionContext present) AND (biomarker.biomarker_name is in primaryDriver.biomarkers[]) → sentence connecting this marker to the lead pattern using primaryDriver.name. If (contributionContext present) AND (biomarker is NOT in primaryDriver.biomarkers but relatedSystemGroupNames.length > 0) → sentence referencing the system group. If derivation is weak or ambiguous → set patternRelevanceLine to null and omit; fall back to contributionContext.factual_statement only. Never fabricate a sentence when contributionContext is absent.
changes.scope_constraint: patternRelevanceLine must be null when: (a) contributionContext is absent, (b) no credible cluster link exists, or (c) primaryDriver is null. Never render raw cluster_id, biomarker_name identifiers, or signal IDs in the derivation sentence. Do not introduce a new backend DTO field — this is a purely frontend computed prop.

changes.description: Fallback model enforcement: Case 1 (L1+L2+L3), Case 2 (L1+L3 when educationalExplainer absent), Case 3 (L1+L2 when contributionContext absent), Case 4 (L1 only — no expansion content, suppress or hide expand button)
changes.root_cause: The existing BiomarkerDetailZones already null-checks educationalExplainer.body (line 209) and contributionContext.factual_statement (line 216), so missing-content suppression is partially in place. Sprint requires these null guards be preserved and extended. Case 4 is the critical addition: when neither educationalExplainer nor contributionContext exists, the expansion zone has no content. The expand button at BiomarkerDials.tsx:330-347 must be suppressed (or the BiomarkerDetailZones must render nothing) to avoid an empty expansion shell. Concretely: in the card render loop (BiomarkerDials.tsx:284-356), compute hasExpandableContent = !!(d.educationalExplainer?.body || d.contributionContext?.factual_statement) and suppress the expand Button and BiomarkerDetailZones render when false.
changes.scope_constraint: Do not render the expand button when no expandable content exists. Do not show an empty expansion panel. Layer 1 card display must always be present regardless of expandable content availability.

stop_conditions_verified: Do not introduce new backend DTO fields — explicitly out of scope (prompt lines 46-52)
Do not touch backend/ssot/, backend/core/pipeline/, backend/core/analytics/ or backend scripts — not in scope
Do not use Gemini/LLM narrative generation — out of scope (prompt line 56)
Do not introduce a new backend-derived pattern relevance field — prompt §Pattern relevance derivation rule: frontend rendering-layer only
Do not render raw signal IDs, phenotype labels, internal IDs, raw KB package content — acceptance criteria line 8
Do not fabricate educational or pattern relevance prose when source data is absent — acceptance criteria line 6, prompt Key principle 3
Do not render empty expansion shells when no Layer 2 or Layer 3 content exists — fallback Case 4
Do not duplicate Layer 1 content (value/range/status/interpretation) inside the expansion zone — it belongs in the card body only
Do not rework the entire biomarker list UI beyond expansion experience — out of scope (prompt line 11)
Do not create new biomarker science generation or new system/pattern taxonomy contract — out of scope (prompt lines 53-54)
regression_protection: BiomarkerDials card body (Layer 1 display: value, unit, reference range, status badge, interpretation, dial) — must be unchanged at BiomarkerDials.tsx:302-348
BiomarkerDials expand/collapse toggle behaviour — must be preserved (toggleSelect at BiomarkerDials.tsx:258-260)
BiomarkerDials desktop sidebar vs mobile inline detail pattern — must be preserved (isDesktop logic at BiomarkerDials.tsx:244-256, conditional render at BiomarkerDials.tsx:351 and 359-365)
ResultsBodyOverview (Section 1) — must be unchanged; no interaction with biomarker expansion
Advanced analysis tabs (ClinicianReportRenderer, InsightsPanel) — must remain functional and untouched
Navigation, loading, error states in results/page.tsx — must be unchanged
determinism_risks: NONE (analytical) — sprint is purely frontend presentation. No analytics logic, ranking, compiler, evaluator, or backend pipeline touched.

RENDERING DETERMINISM — patternRelevanceLine derivation must be fully deterministic from data state: same data in must always produce same line or null out. No random or time-dependent logic permitted.

NULL SAFETY — derivation must handle null primaryDriver, null clinicianReport, null contribution_context, empty clusters[] without throwing. All path conditions must be explicitly null-checked before use.
EXPAND BUTTON VISIBILITY — hasExpandableContent guard must be logically correct: Layer 2 OR Layer 3 content presence must trigger it. Missing this guard causes empty expansion shells (UX regression).
behavioural_surface_area: frontend/app/components/biomarkers/BiomarkerDials.tsx — BiomarkerDetailZones restructure (three-layer labels and layout), BiomarkerDialEntry interface (add patternRelevanceLine), expand button guard (hasExpandableContent)
frontend/app/(app)/results/page.tsx — patternRelevanceLine derivation logic inside biomarkers.forEach loop (lines 382-407), pass patternRelevanceLine into biomarkerDialData entries
forbidden_fields_confirmed_absent: New backend DTO fields — none introduced; patternRelevanceLine is a frontend-only computed prop in BiomarkerDialEntry
phenotype — not in scope, not in DTO, not used
raw signal names — excluded by stop condition; pattern relevance sentence must use human-readable names only
